sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to walk with the feet near together
2. to come together, meet with one
3. of things which fall out at the same time, to happen, turn out, come to pass
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and the base of G939; to walk (figuratively transpire) together, that is, concur (take place): - be (-fall), happen (unto).
